We meet every month, but today we are meeting the rector.
I live in Maceio, but right now I am staying in a hotel in Seoul.
Good evening. I am Professor Han, the provost of the university here in Seoul. Welcome. So, tell me, what do you do in Brazil?
Good evening, Professor Han. I work in public administration, and I live in Maceio. I usually travel with a delegation.
A delegation! But tonight you are here alone, I think. Are you traveling by yourself this time?
Yes. This week, I am traveling alone. It is temporary, just for this conference.
Very brave. And what are you working on at the moment?
Currently, I am preparing a presentation about leadership. My colleague is helping me with the slides.
Wonderful. The waiter is here. Would you like the fish or the meat tonight?
It depends on the day, but tonight I would rather have the fish, thank you.
Excellent choice. You speak English very well. Do you practice every day?
I study every day, and I am improving. Right now, my granddaughter is learning English with me.
It depends on the day.
I would rather have the fish.

Hello, Maria Clara. This is Sofia, your colleague from the international office. I am calling with a quick update about this week. Usually, we meet on Mondays, but this week is different. Right now, the delegation is arriving from China, so we are changing the schedule. Normally you present in the morning, but today you are presenting after lunch. The provost is waiting for you at the hotel at seven. I am confirming your dinner appointment now. Have a good day, and see you soon.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the education conference. Let me give you a short update on today's program. Every day, the conference starts at nine o'clock. This morning, we are starting a little later, because many guests are still arriving. At the moment, our team is preparing the main room. Usually, the first speaker talks for thirty minutes, but today Maria Clara is presenting a special session about leadership. Please confirm your seat with a colleague at the front desk. Thank you, and enjoy the day.
Hello. My name is Maria Clara. Usually, I travel with a big delegation. But this week, I am traveling alone. Right now, I am preparing for an important dinner in Seoul.
